title: 这条 prompt 适合用于春季时尚营销或社交媒体推广，特别是针对年轻女性群体。它结合了韩国时尚元素和梦幻的春天氛围，非常适合在 Instagram、Pinterest 等平台上吸引关注。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 适合用于春季时尚营销或社交媒体推广，特别是针对年轻女性群体。它结合了韩国时尚元素和梦幻的春天氛围，非常适合在 Instagram、Pinterest 等平台上吸引关注。
prompt_original: Cute Korean spring aesthetic scrapbook poster, dreamy K-fashion portrait, soft blonde girl standing in a blooming flower garden, pastel blue sky background, cream floral blouse layered under a knitted ivory sweater vest, light blue high-waisted jeans, natural smile, glowing fair skin, soft makeup, cherry blossom trees, colorful spring flowers, cozy countryside garden, bright natural sunlight, kawaii doodle overlays, hand-drawn white hearts, smiley faces, stars, sparkles, rainbows, playful handwritten typography, polaroid photo frames, masking tape stickers, scrapbook collage layout, Pinterest aesthetic, Korean magazine editorial, cottagecore fashion, dreamy spring vibes, wholesome mood, soft pastel color palette, clean composition, aesthetic social media poster, ultra detailed, photorealistic, high quality, cute and charming atmosphere, subtle bokeh, lifestyle photography, Instagram reel cover, fashion moodboard, Y2K scrapbook design, white outline around subject, flower-themed decorations, 8k masterpiece
prompt_zh: 可爱的韩国春天风格剪贴簿海报，梦幻的韩式时尚肖像，一个柔美的金发女孩站在盛开的花丛中，背景是淡蓝色的天空，穿着奶油色花卉衬衫和针织象牙色背心，浅蓝色高腰牛仔裤，自然微笑，白皙发光的皮肤，柔和的妆容，樱花树，多彩的春花，舒适的乡村花园，明亮的自然阳光，可爱的手绘涂鸦叠加，手绘白色爱心、笑脸、星星、闪光、彩虹，俏皮的手写字体，拍立得照片框，遮蔽胶带贴纸，剪贴簿拼贴布局，Pinterest 风格，韩国杂志编辑风格，田园风时尚，梦幻的春天氛围，温馨的情绪，柔和的粉彩色调，干净的构图，美学社交媒体海报，超详细，照片级真实感，高质量，可爱迷人的氛围，微妙的散景效果，生活方式摄影，Instagram Reels 封面，时尚情绪板，Y2K 剪贴簿设计，主体周围有白色轮廓，以花朵为主题的装饰，8K 杰作
